description: Imports an OWL ontology file (RDF/XML or JSON-LD) and converts it to the Fabric Ontology definition format. Compatible with Ontology Playground catalogue .rdf files.
notes: Detects format from file extension (.rdf/.owl → RDF/XML, .jsonld/.json → JSON-LD) or content sniffing. Use --output-dir instead of --workspace/--id for local export only (no API call). Supports owl:Class → EntityType, owl:DatatypeProperty → properties, owl:ObjectProperty → RelationshipType, ont:isIdentifier → entityIdParts.

query_examples.description: ID of the Fabric Ontology item updated.
